name: MT - Strada Stretta
plot:
Sara Scerri, Jerry Mallia, Frederick Testa, Kim Dalli, Lawrence Buontempo, Daniel Azzopardi, Aiken Buhagiar, Steven Dalli, Daniel Attard Portughes, Andrei Grech, Mark Frendo, Laura Zahra and Vanessa Vella.

The series is based on incidents recorded in a diary written in Malta in 1957 and found in 2015 during refurbishing works on a pub. The actual setting is based on history books, while the story is based on contextual creativity.

name: MT - Il-Madonna Taċ-Ċoqqa
plot: This Maltese classic recounts the story of Karmnu ta’ Randu, a farmer, who was a fanatic of the local feast at a village named Hal-Mirdum. He was highly renowned and respected by all. He was the main organiser behind all the preparations for the traditional feast every summer, putting up the decorations in the village streets, inside the church and also being one of the statue bearers during the procession.

name: MT - Il-Prinċipal
plot: Il-Principal, the hilarious 12 episode comedy penned by Joe Julian Farrugia, will be the next hit in Hermann Bonaci Productions' series of popular drama. Based on the colourful events of a newly appointed Civil Service Principal Officer, the sitcom takes place both at the Government offices and at the Principal's home.
